chunks.title: Creation of Light and Day
chunks.reason: Describes the first day of creation including the separation of light and darkness.

chunks.title: Creation of the Expanse
chunks.reason: Describes the second day involving the separation of waters and naming of heaven.

chunks.title: Creation of Land and Vegetation
chunks.reason: Describes the third day including the gathering of waters and growth of plants.

chunks.title: Creation of Celestial Bodies
chunks.reason: Describes the fourth day involving the creation of lights to rule day and night.

chunks.title: Creation of Sea Creatures and Birds
chunks.reason: Describes the fifth day involving the creation of aquatic life and birds with a blessing.

chunks.title: Creation of Land Animals and Man
chunks.reason: Describes the sixth day including land animals, humanity, their dominion, and food provisions.
